mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) FROM fitness_booking b INNER JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.deleted = false AND u.deleted = false AND b.booking_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_course WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_booking WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.start_time) AS hour, COUNT(b.id) AS count FROM fitness_booking b INNER JOIN fitness_course c ON b.course_id = c.id WHERE b.deleted = false AND c.deleted = false AND b.status IN (1, 3) GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.start_time) ORDER BY hour

SELECT c.category AS categoryName, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS courseCount, COUNT(b.id) AS bookingCount FROM fitness_course c LEFT JOIN fitness_booking b ON c.id = b.course_id AND b.deleted = false WHERE c.deleted = false AND c.category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.category ORDER BY bookingCount DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 0
